<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/ingest/contracts/{id}/upload_source/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Upload contract source code for verification.
Accepts a file (Rust code or tarball) and optional ABI JSON.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
